title: aira micrantha
intro: Aira micrantha is a type of flowering plant, specifically a grass-like species, belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Aira micrantha has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections, reducing fever, and soothing irritated skin. Aira micrantha can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
